meta.description: Future State document capturing use cases, requirements, fields, access levels and open questions for a feature

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_ab3ba16a_87fe_4a0d_b54c_a893206d8225" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "title" TEXT,
    "use_cases" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "document_owner" TEXT,
    "designer" TEXT,
    "tech_leads" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "qa" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "figma" TEXT,
    "detailed_design" TEXT,
    "current_state" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "assumptions" TEXT,
    "out_of_scope" TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
    "business_process_upstream" TEXT,
    "business_process_downstream" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_ab3ba16a_87fe_4a0d_b54c_a893206d8225" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_ab3ba16a87fe4a0d_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
